name: Spaghetti with Tomato Ricotta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces can peeled tomatoes drained, and coarsely chopped
1/2 cup tightly packed Italian parsley, finely chopped
1/2 cup tightly packed fresh basil leaves, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic, and sauté until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Wipe the mushrooms clean with a damp paper towel and slice thinly.
4. Add the mushrooms to the saucepan and stir continuously, cooking over high heat for about 1 minute.
5. Add the tomatoes, bring to a boil, and cook uncovered for a few more minutes.
6. Stir in the ricotta, parsley, basil, salt, and pepper.
7. Meanwhile, bring 5 quarts of water to a rolling boil in a large covered pot. Add 2 tablespoons of salt.
8. Add all the pasta at once and stir well; cook briskly for about 7 minutes, or until al dente (tender but still firm to bite).
9. Drain the pasta in a colander and shake vigorously to remove excess water.
10. Toss with the hot sauce and season the pasta to taste with salt and pepper.
11. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
